commands.repair_reason: Human review is needed because this broad external Feishu PR lacks real behavior proof and needs security/product decisions rather than a narrow automated repair.; Needs attention: The diff adds unscoped cached Feishu identities/groups, an agent-callable local file upload path, and has a prior branch-history secret-like credential report.; Review finding: [P1] Avoid timestamp-only stale-message rejection — extension... (sha=82d227e3418d6141e1cdab9925618c0d6dc03be9)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds broad Feishu plugin changes for streaming cards, event/create-time dedupe, fast abort/recall handling, contacts/groups/send/calendar tools and skills, plus daemon service working-directory resolution.

Reproducibility: yes. for the review blockers by source inspection: PR-head code shows timestamp-only create_time rejection, unscoped contacts/groups caches, missing account routing, direct-abort claim loss, and broad file-send exposure. No live Feishu behavior was reproduced because the PR includes no after-fix proof or credentials.
commands.review_followup: Human review is needed because this broad external Feishu PR lacks real behavior proof and needs security/product decisions rather than a narrow automated repair.

target.title: feat(feishu): comprehensive plugin enhancements — streaming, dedup, skills, calendar, and stability
